summary: Tested Cancel Order feature and Login Role Selection. Backend: All 12 tests passed. Frontend: Role selection working, but Dashboard has severe performance issue causing infinite loading spinner.

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard stuck on loading spinner for 10+ seconds due to sequential offer fetching for each active auction

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/sellers/orders/{auction_id}/cancel endpoint exists and requires auth
Backend: POST /api/buyers/orders/{auction_id}/cancel endpoint exists and requires auth
Backend: POST /api/admin/orders/{auction_id}/cancel endpoint exists and requires auth
Backend: Seller cancel endpoint returns 404 for non-existent auction
Backend: Buyer cancel endpoint returns 404 for non-existent auction
Backend: Admin cancel endpoint returns 404 for non-existent auction
Backend: Seller cannot cancel other seller's auction (403)
Frontend: Role selection screen visible at /auth
Frontend: 'I'm a Buyer' card present with data-testid='select-buyer'
Frontend: 'I'm a Seller' card present with data-testid='select-farmer'
Frontend: Clicking Buyer card shows login form with 'Buyer Account' indicator
Frontend: 'Change account type' button returns to role selection
Frontend: Seller login navigates to dashboard
failed_tests: Frontend: Dashboard tabs not visible due to infinite loading (performance issue)
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Dashboard performance issue - sequential offer fetching in fetchData() (lines 79-86 in Dashboard.jsx) causes 10+ second load times. Should use Promise.all() for parallel fetching or implement a batch endpoint.
After fixing performance, verify Orders tab shows Cancel Order buttons for orders with winners
After fixing performance, verify Cancel Order dialog opens with reason textarea and refund warning for paid orders
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx lines 79-86: Sequential API calls for offers causing severe performance degradation. Each active auction triggers a separate API call. With many auctions, this causes the dashboard to hang.
Recommendation: Use Promise.all() to fetch offers in parallel, or create a batch endpoint /api/sellers/me/received-offers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cancel Order feature backend endpoints are working correctly. Role selection UI is working. Main issue is Dashboard performance - the fetchData() function in Dashboard.jsx fetches offers for each active auction sequentially, causing the dashboard to hang on loading spinner. Once this is fixed, the Orders tab should be visible with Cancel Order buttons. The Cancel Order dialog code is already implemented correctly with reason textarea and refund warning.

role_selection_screen.details: Role selection screen shows at /auth with Buyer and Seller cards. Clicking a card shows login form with role indicator. 'Change account type' button returns to role selection.

cancel_order_backend.details: All three cancel order endpoints exist and work correctly: /api/sellers/orders/{id}/cancel, /api/buyers/orders/{id}/cancel, /api/admin/orders/{id}/cancel. They require authentication and return proper error codes.

cancel_order_frontend.details: Cannot verify due to Dashboard loading issue. Code review shows Cancel Order button and dialog are implemented correctly in Dashboard.jsx.

admin_panel_removed_from_seller.details: No admin panel content found in Dashboard.jsx for seller view.

performance_issue.description: Sequential API calls to fetch offers for each active auction
performance_issue.impact: Dashboard hangs on loading spinner for 10+ seconds
performance_issue.suggested_fix: Use Promise.all() for parallel fetching or create batch endpoint
